---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, adapter, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Outfit cannot do today?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. If it is a new capability or adapter, describe the
scope shape or the runtime it would target.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else, links, or examples.
